# Icp

**Summary**: Inductively coupled plasma mass spectrometry used to determine the chemical composition of minerals.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1996-jarad|Jarad, 1996]] used ICP to determine the concentration of P2O5 and other chemical compounds in phosphorite samples.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Used for determining grade in percent of chemical compounds such as P2O5, SiO2, Al2O3, Fe2O3, CaO, and MgO. ([[1996-jarad|Jarad, 1996, p. 57]])
